title: Huawei 10G SFP+ DAC cable, passive, DDM, 1m
description: Huawei 10G SFP+ DAC cable in 1m length is a fast and cheap solution for easily connecting two network active devices at 10Gbps speed without the need to purchase separate SFP+ modules and optical patch cables A quality twinax DAC cable can be used to connect Huawei S-series switches. In addition, the cables can be used for stacking GPSR
